queries.question: what type of vendors are present at every craft fair at least once?
queries.sql: SELECT Vendors.type  from Craft_Fairs_Vendors join Vendors on Craft_Fairs_Vendors.vendor_type_id = Vendors.id join Craft_Fairs on Craft_Fairs_Vendors.craft_fair_id = Craft_Fairs.id   GROUP BY Craft_Fairs_Vendors.vendor_type_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Craft_Fairs_Vendors.craft_fair_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Craft_Fairs)

queries.question: for each craft fair, what is the corresponding vendor type?
queries.sql: select craft_fairs.name , vendors.type from Craft_Fairs_Vendors join Vendors on Craft_Fairs_Vendors.vendor_type_id = Vendors.id join Craft_Fairs on Craft_Fairs_Vendors.craft_fair_id = Craft_Fairs.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?craft_fairs_vendors a :Craft_Fairs_Vendors .
  ?vendors a :Vendors .
  ?craft_fairs_vendors p:hasVendors ?vendors .
  ?craft_fairs a :Craft_Fairs .
  ?craft_fairs_vendors p:hasCraft_Fairs ?craft_fairs .
  ?craft_fairs p:name ?name .
  ?vendors p:type ?type .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: what are the types of vendors associated with each craft fair?
